data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓒，原名白雪，演员、配音演员。毕业于北京电影学院高职配音班，师从资深配音演员徐燕。现居北京。嗓音轻柔纯净，擅长演绎温柔可人的女性角色。代表作电视剧《雪山飞狐》程灵素、《鹿鼎记》阿珂，游戏《仙剑奇侠传》系列柳梦璃、凌波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: 白雪岑，又名白杺瓚，原名白雪，演員、配音演員。畢業於北京電影學院高職配音班，師從資深配音演員徐燕。現居北京。嗓音輕柔純淨，擅長演繹温柔可人的女性角色。代表作電視劇《雪山飛狐》程靈素、《鹿鼎記》阿珂，遊戲《仙劍奇俠傳》系列柳夢璃、淩波等。
data.name: 白雪岑

data.biography: Nopjira Lerkkajornnamkul (Nickname: Fern) is a Thai actress and a very accomplished artist. She studied Civil Engineering at Thai-German Pre-Engineering School and graduated with a Bachelor of Engineering Degree from King Mongkut University of Technology North Bangkok (KMUTNB). She is currently studying her Master of Civil Engineering, Faculty of Engineering at Chulalongkorn. She works at Exact & Scenario GMM Grammy Place and also works at Powerline Engineering Public Company Limited in Thailand. A few of her favorite hobbies are photography, running, swimming and exercising.
data.name: Nopjira Lerkkajornnamkul
นพจิรา ฤกษ์ขจรนามกุล

data.biography: 人称肥Kent、Kent哥、肥猫，香港著名演员，香港电影金像奖第五届（《何必有我》）第十六届（《三个受伤的警察》）最佳男主角及第二届香港电影金紫荆奖最佳男主角（《三个受伤的警察》）。郑则仕自小在天台木屋区长大，家境清贫，为了减轻家庭负担，身为长子的他中学未毕业就到珠宝店学徒。1972年，他入读长弓影业公司第一期演员训练班，但多演些跑龙套角色，后来参加比赛拿了冠军并加入无线电视以后，他才崭露头角。1985年他自导自演的《何必有我》使他声名鹊起。《肥猫寻亲记》则让内地观众记住了他。
data.name: 郑则仕

data.biography: Kent Cheng Jak-Si (Chinese: 鄭則士, born 22 May 1951) is a Hong Kong film and television actor. He is a two time recipient of the best actor award at the Hong Kong Film Awards.
data.name: Kent Cheng Jak-Si

data.biography: Trịnh Tắc Sĩ (chữ Hán phồn thể: 鄭則士, chữ Hán giản thể: 郑则士, tên tiếng Anh: Kent Cheng Jak-si, sinh ngày 22 tháng 5 năm 1951) là một diễn viên điện ảnh Hồng Kông. Ông đã hai lần được nhận Giải thưởng Điện ảnh Hồng Kông cho Nam diễn viên chính xuất sắc nhất.
data.name: Trịnh Tắc Sĩ

data.biography: 鄭則仕，原名鄭則時，人稱肥 Kent、Kent 哥、肥貓，香港著名演員，香港電影金像獎第五屆《何必有我》第十六屆《三個受傷的警察》最佳男主角及第二屆香港電影金紫荊獎最佳男主角《三個受傷的警察》。鄭則仕自小在天台木屋區長大，家境清貧，為了減輕家庭負擔，身為長子的他中學未畢業就到珠寶店學徒。1972 年，他入讀長弓影業公司第一期演員訓練班，但多演些跑龍套角色，後來參加比賽拿了冠軍並加入無線電視以後，他才嶄露頭角。1985 年他自導自演的《何必有我》使他聲名鵲起。《肥貓尋親記》則讓內地觀眾記住了他。
data.name: 鄭則仕

data.biography: Kent Cheng Jak-Si (chinois : 鄭則士, né le 22 mai 1951) est un acteur de cinéma et de télévision hongkongais. Il a remporté deux fois le prix du meilleur acteur aux Hong Kong Film Awards.
data.name: Kent Cheng Jak-Si

data.biography:
Byungchan (병찬), also referred to by his full name Choi Byungchan, is a South Korean singer under Play M Entertainment. He is a member of the boy group VICTON.

In May 2019, he, alongside Seungwoo, became a contestant on the competition show Produce X 101. However, on July 11, it was announced he would be leaving the show due to health issues.
data.name: Choi Byung-chan

data.biography: 韩国男歌手、舞者和演员，在韩国男子团体VICTON内担任副唱。2016年11月9日，透过首张迷你专辑《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾参加大热选秀《Produce X 101》，因腿伤中途退赛。2020年，通过JTBC迷你剧《Live》作为演员出道。
data.name: 崔秉灿

data.biography: 韓國男歌手、舞者和演員，在韓國男子團體 VICTON 內擔任副唱。2016 年 11 月 9 日，透過首張迷你專輯《Voice To New World》，以主打歌《I'm fine》出道，曾參加大熱選秀《Produce X 101》，因腿傷中途退賽。2020 年，通過 JTBC 迷你劇《Live》作為演員出道。
data.name: 崔秉燦

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, June 7, 1985) is a Japanese voice actress (seiyū) from Osaka Prefecture. She is affiliated with Raccoon Dog. She was previously affiliated with Pro Fit. She has blood type O and is 162 cm tall.
data.name: Marie Miyake

data.biography: Marie Miyake (三宅 麻理恵, Miyake Marie, 7 de junio de 1985) es una actriz de voz (seiyū) japonesa de la prefectura de Osaka. Está afiliada a Raccoon Dog. Anteriormente estuvo afiliada a Pro Fit. Tiene grupo sanguíneo O y mide 162 cm.
data.name: Marie Miyake
Đấu Phá Thương Khung
data.overview: Phim Đấu Phá Thương Khung: Chuyển thể từ tiểu thuyết cùng tên của tác giả Thiên Tàm Thổ Đậu.  Tiêu Viêm là thiên tài tu luyện đấu khí của nhà họ Tiêu, 11 tuổi đã đột phá Thập Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí, trở thành đấu thủ trẻ tuổi nhất của gia tộc suốt trăm năm qua. Nhưng đến năm 12 tuổi, Tiêu Viêm bất ngờ mất đi khả năng tu luyện, chỉ còn lại Tam Đoạn Đấu Chi Khí. Trong 3 năm sau đó, nhà họ Tiêu cũng liên tiếp gặp nhiều bất trắc.  Đúng vào lúc Tiêu Viêm tuyệt vọng nhất, một linh hồn xuất hiện từ trong chiếc nhẫn trên tay Tiêu Viêm, mở ra trước mắt Tiêu Viêm một cánh cửa hoàn toàn mới. Dưới sự giúp đỡ của Dược lão, Tiêu Viêm đã hồi phục và nâng cao được công lực của mình, đánh bại Nạp Lan Yên Nhiên khi giao hẹn ba năm đến.  Nhưng không may là cha Tiêu Viêm lại bị Vân Lam tông bắt đi, Tiêu Viêm lại bắt đầu cuộc hành trình nhiều thử thách nhằm cứu thoát cha mình…

data.biography:
Stephen Tung Wai (traditional Chinese: 董瑋; simplified Chinese: 董玮) is a Hong Kong actor born in Mainland China as Tung Wen Wei. His family moved to Hong Kong when he was four years old. Four years later, he began to learn the opera of Beijing under the direction of the famous Ms. Fan Fok Fa. It was under his tutelage that he learned the martial arts of the north. He first appeared on the big screen in the 1965 film Squadron 77 (七七敢死隊).

In 1978, Snake in the Eagle's Shadow hit the box office and the race for Jackie Chan's successor began. With his physical abilities displayed in movies such as The Mar's Villa (神腿), Golden Mask (紅衣冷血金面人) and Ten Brothers of Shaolin (十大弟子), one would have thought Tung Wai was a good candidate for success. He further got to show off his talents in the 1979 film The Incredible Kung Fu Master (醒目仔蛊惑招), but failed to become the next Kung Fu star.  At the beginning of the 1980s, Stephen Tung took a four year break away from the big screens to devote himself to television. He works on several TV series from Kung Fu or other Wu Xia, accumulating experience in his new business. Finally, in 1984, he returns to the screens in the first roles with films like Hocus Pocus (人嚇鬼) and Journey of the Doomed (水兒武士). However, the films were not very successful, and did not allow him to impose himself as a foreground actor.
data.name: Stephen Tung Wai

data.biography: 导演、动作指导、演员，自认是个喜欢电影的从业者。1958年生于上海，十六岁就当上电影武师，穿梭台港工作。1980年代以演员身分活跃于电视、电影，之后也担任导演。动作指导代表作品众多，曾十度入围金马奖最佳动作设计，并以《紫雨风暴》《七剑》两度获奖。
data.name: 董玮

data.biography: 導演、動作指導、演員，自認是個喜歡電影的從業者。1958 年生於上海，十六歲就當上電影武師，穿梭台港工作。1980 年代以演員身分活躍於電視、電影，之後也擔任導演。動作指導代表作品眾多，曾十度入圍金馬獎最佳動作設計，並以《紫雨風暴》《七劍》兩度獲獎。
data.name: 董瑋

data.biography: Lynn は、日本の女性声優。
data.name: Lynn

data.biography: Lynn is a Japanese voice actress from Niigata Prefecture affiliated with the agency Arts Vision. She was born to a Japanese–American father and a Japanese–Brazilian mother in Yokosuka, Kanagawa. After becoming interested in entering the entertainment industry early in life, she made her debut as a voice actress in 2011. Originally playing supporting characters, she played her first main roles in 2014. She is known for her roles as Nozomi Kaminashi in Keijo! and Fuuka Akitsuki in Fuuka.

Lynn是日本的女性声优。

美日混血儿，Lynn是她的本名。

非常喜欢猫。怕蛇。

喜欢的歌手是绚香。

喜欢的食物是拉面，讨厌的食物是韭菜。

日本播音演技研究所出身，养成所时期在日播研的第一天便迷路找不到教室了，被路过的饭田友子搭救带到了教室

开心的时候会哼歌，被夸赞的时候会害羞
data.name: 琳恩

data.biography: Lynn 是日本的女性聲優，為美日混血兒，父親為美國人，父姓為 Starr。出生於神奈川縣橫須賀市，成長於新潟縣，所屬公司為 ARTSVISION。
data.name: Lynn

data.biography: Lynn ist eine japanische Synchronsprecherin aus der Präfektur Niigata, die der Agentur Arts Vision angehört. Sie wurde als Tochter eines japanisch-amerikanischen Vaters und einer japanisch-brasilianischen Mutter in Yokosuka, Kanagawa, geboren. Nachdem sie früh das Interesse daran entwickelte, in die Unterhaltungsbranche einzusteigen, gab sie 2011 ihr Debüt als Synchronsprecherin. Ursprünglich sprach sie Nebenrollen, bevor sie 2014 erstmals Hauptrollen übernahm. Bekannt ist sie für Rollen wie Nozomi Kaminashi in Keijo! und Fuuka Akitsuki in Fuuka.
data.name: Lynn

data.biography:
Лінн - японська сейю з префектури Niigata. Дебютувала в 2011 році.

Вона відома своїми ролями як Нозомі Камінаші в Кейджо! і Фуука Акіцукі у Фууці.
data.name: Лінн

data.biography:
邓恩熙，2005年出生于重庆，中国内地女演员。

2014年，年仅9岁的邓恩熙参加中国首席少儿模特大赛，最终获得全国季军。2015年，参与录制湖北卫视青少年群体成长真人秀《英雄少年镇》。2016年，因参演个人电影处女作《嫌疑人X的献身》而正式进入演艺圈。2017年，参演由饶晓志执导的荒诞喜剧《无名之辈》。2018年，参演由陈可辛监制、岩井俊二编剧的情感片《你好，之华》；同年9月，主演根据蝴蝶蓝同名小说改编的东方玄幻剧《天醒之路》。2019年，主演根据泰国电视剧《极限S：滑板篇》改编的《极限17滑魂》。
data.name: 邓恩熙

data.biography: Deng Enxi is a Chinese actress born in Chongqing, China. She is among the only two girls under the well-known Times Fengjun Entertainment. She made her acting debut in the movie "The Devotion of Suspect X" in 2017. Some of her biggest achievements are winning the 23rd Shanghai International Film Festival Best New Actress award and the Weibo Awards Ceremony Rising Artist of the Year 2020 award.
data.name: Deng Enxi

data.biography:
鄧恩熙，2005 年出生於重慶，中國內地女演員。

2014 年，年僅 9 歲的鄧恩熙參加中國首席少兒模特大賽，最終獲得全國季軍。2015 年，參與錄製湖北衞視青少年群體成長真人秀《英雄少年鎮》。2016 年，因參演個人電影處女作《嫌疑人 X 的獻身》而正式進入演藝圈。2017 年，參演由饒曉志執導的荒誕喜劇《無名之輩》。2018 年，參演由陳可辛監製、巖井俊二編劇的情感片《你好，之華》；同年 9 月，主演根據蝴蝶藍同名小説改編的東方玄幻劇《天醒之路》。2019 年，主演根據泰國電視劇《極限 S：滑板篇》改編的《極限 17 滑魂》。
data.name: 鄧恩熙

data.biography: Shree Bishnoi is an Indian Actor who works in Hindi films , Known For Ikkis (2025) ,Kaanchi(2023) etc . He is from Rajasthan and living in Mumbai. Shree Bishnoi's journey began in the rustic heart of Rajasthan, where his passion for theatre ignited during his student years. Driven by ambition, he ventured to Mumbai, the city of dreams, to pursue his artistic aspirations. There, he immersed himself in the vibrant theatre scene, tirelessly honing his craft and seizing every learning opportunity. His dedication paved the way for roles in numerous short films, advertisements, and serials, enriching his experience and building his repertoire. This culminated in a significant breakthrough: the pivotal role of Prayag Singh in the highly anticipated film "Ikkis." Directed by the acclaimed Sriram Raghavan, "Ikkis" tells the inspiring story of Param Vir Chakra winner Second Lieutenant Arun Khetrapal. Along with Agastya Nanda as Arun Khetrapal, Jaideep Ahlawat and Sikandar Khair will also be seen in important roles in the film .Shree Bishnoi sought a deeper understanding of the industry by working as a casting director at Sunil Shetty's company. This experience provided invaluable insights into the multifaceted nature of the entertainment world, further solidifying his commitment to his craft. Shree Bishnoi's journey is a testament to his unwavering determination and relentless pursuit of excellence, promising a bright future in the world of acting.
data.name: Shree Bishnoi
